name: toggle-group-demo
visual_summary: Toggle-group-demo is a reusable UI component used in settings, preferences, or feature toggles, allowing users to select multiple options from a list. It consists of a container for a collection of toggle switches and displays the selected options. This component can be used to simplify complex configurations by providing a user-friendly interface for users to toggle features on and off.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready toggle-group component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-group-demo
Description: Toggle-group-demo is a reusable UI component used in settings, preferences, or feature toggles, allowing users to select multiple options from a list. It consists of a container for a collection of toggle switches and displays the selected options. This component can be used to simplify complex configurations by providing a user-friendly interface for users to toggle features on and off.
Style: modern, flat, material
Interactions: animated, onhover, enabledisable
Tags: settings, preferences, toggle-group, switches, selection

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
